name: Asian Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Seasoned rice vinegar (or 3 tablespoons Cider vinegar mixed with 1 teaspoon Sugar and 1/2 teaspoon Wasabi powder or prepared horseradish)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the diced avocado, shredded pickled ginger, and seasoned rice vinegar.
2. Stir in the sesame seeds until evenly coated.
3. Mix gently until well combined.
